name: W_CIDeconvolve
description: 3D/2D deconvolution for widefield and confocal microscopy images using CI SHB-accelerated Richardson-Lucy, SHB-RL with Total Variation regularisation, or sparse-Hessian variational deconvolution. Supports GPU acceleration via CUDA (PyTorch).

inputs.name: (ess) Deconvolution method
inputs.description: Which deconvolution algorithm to use. ci_rl: SHB-accelerated Richardson-Lucy. ci_rl_tv: same with Total Variation regularisation. ci_sparse_hessian: sparse-Hessian / SPITFIRE-style variational deconvolution.

inputs.name: (ess) RL iterations
inputs.description: Number of RL iterations per channel, comma-separated. A single value applies to all channels. Example: '150' or '150, 100, 200'.

inputs.name: (ess) Convergence mode
inputs.description: Early-stopping convergence check. 'auto' stops when relative change falls below the threshold. 'none' disables convergence checking and runs all iterations.

inputs.name: (ess) Convergence threshold
inputs.description: Relative change threshold for early stopping when convergence is 'auto'. Smaller values allow more iterations before stopping.

inputs.name: (ess) Overrule image metadata
inputs.description: When disabled, image metadata is used where present and the descriptor values below are used only as fallbacks for missing metadata. When enabled, the descriptor values always replace image metadata.

inputs.name: (ess) Numerical aperture
inputs.description: Objective numerical aperture. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Emission wavelengths
inputs.description: Emission wavelengths in nm, comma-separated (one per channel). Used as fallbacks when image metadata is missing, or as overrides when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Pixel size XY (nm)
inputs.description: Lateral pixel size in nanometers. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Pixel size Z (nm)
inputs.description: Axial pixel size / Z step in nanometers. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Microscope type
inputs.description: Microscope type. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Excitation wavelengths
inputs.description: Excitation wavelengths in nm, comma-separated (one per channel). Used as fallbacks when image metadata is missing, or as overrides when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Confocal pinhole (AU)
inputs.description: Confocal pinhole diameter in Airy disk units, comma-separated per channel. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled. Use 0 for the legacy point-detector model.

inputs.name: (ess) Immersion medium
inputs.description: Immersion medium refractive index. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Sample / mounting medium
inputs.description: Sample or mounting medium refractive index. Used as a fallback when image metadata is missing, or as an override when image metadata is overruled.

inputs.name: (ess) Z-projection
inputs.description: Output a 2D Z-projection instead of the full 3D stack. 'mip': maximum intensity projection, 'sum': sum projection, 'none': keep full 3D stack. Ignored for 2D input images.

inputs.name: Benchmark mode
inputs.description: Run benchmark: deconvolves the first input image with ci_rl, ci_rl_tv, and ci_sparse_hessian using the requested iteration counts, writes a CSV with timing metrics, and generates MIP montage images.

inputs.name: Benchmark crop
inputs.description: When benchmark mode is active, centre-crop the image to tile-size limits before deconvolution. Speeds up the benchmark significantly for large images.

inputs.name: (adv) Compute image metrics
inputs.description: Compute optional deconvolution-effect image metrics. Disabled by default because FFT/gradient metrics can be slow on large images.

inputs.name: (adv) TV lambda
inputs.description: Total Variation regularization strength for ci_rl_tv. Ignored by ci_rl and ci_sparse_hessian. Range 0–1, typical values 0.00005–0.001.

inputs.name: (adv) Damping
inputs.description: Noise-gated damping for ci_rl and ci_rl_tv. 'none' or '0' disables damping. 'auto' selects the recommended automatic value. Ignored by ci_sparse_hessian.

inputs.name: (adv) 2D widefield mode
inputs.description: 2D widefield deconvolution mode. 'auto' uses the enhanced collapsed-PSF model for single-plane widefield images. 'legacy_2d' uses plain 2D RL.

inputs.name: (adv) Sparse Hessian weight
inputs.description: Hessian-vs-sparsity balance for ci_sparse_hessian. Ignored by RL-family methods. Typical values are 0.4–0.8.

inputs.name: (adv) Sparse Hessian reg
inputs.description: Data-vs-regularizer balance for ci_sparse_hessian. Ignored by RL-family methods. Higher values stay closer to the observed data.

inputs.name: (adv) Background subtraction
inputs.description: Background subtraction mode. 'auto' estimates background automatically. A numeric value (e.g. 100) subtracts that constant. '0' disables background subtraction.

inputs.name: (adv) Offset
inputs.description: Positive offset added during processing and removed afterwards. 'auto' uses the deconwolf-style default of 5. 'none' or '0' disables it.

inputs.name: (adv) Prefilter sigma
inputs.description: Sigma in pixels for Anscombe-domain Gaussian prefiltering. '0' disables the prefilter.

inputs.name: (adv) Initial estimate
inputs.description: Initial estimate for iterative solvers. 'auto' chooses from image statistics and microscope type; 'flat' uses a uniform mean image; 'percentile_flat' uses a robust median flat image; 'observed' uses the raw observation; 'observed_bgsub' subtracts background first; 'lowpass' uses a strongly smoothed observation; 'lowpass_bgsub' smooths after background subtraction; 'hybrid' blends background-subtracted observed and smoothed structure.

inputs.name: (adv) Compute device
inputs.description: Force compute device. 'auto' uses CUDA if available, otherwise CPU.

inputs.name: (adv) 2D WF aggressiveness
inputs.description: Aggressiveness of the 2D widefield auto deconvolution. Only used when two_d_mode is 'auto' and the image is a single-plane widefield.

inputs.name: (adv) 2D WF background radius (µm)
inputs.description: Background estimator neighborhood radius in micrometers for 2D widefield auto mode.

inputs.name: (adv) 2D WF background scale
inputs.description: Multiplier applied to the auto-estimated background in 2D widefield auto mode.
